title: Data export timeout for large datasets
description: Enterprise exports over 10K rows can time out because the v2.14.5 query optimizer change resets the batch cursor between pages.
fix: PR #356, branch fix/export-cursor-reset, preserves cursor state across batches.
validation: Unit tests pass. Staging validation on 100K rows completed successfully in 45 seconds.
eta: Production deploy can go out in the 1pm maintenance window after approval.
